description: jaguar Classic is an aromatic fougere fragrance for women from Jaguar contained in a stylish flask. The flacon is inspired by the new generation automobile in its design. The top notes notes are mandarin, lavender, basil and citrus. Middle notes have orange and lotus flower with a spicy ginger twist lead to the base notes of sandalwood, benzoe and white musk.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
